description: Makes picking a gif in the gif picker insert a link into the chatbox instead of instantly sending it

description: Display the file name of images & GIFs as a tooltip when hovering over them

description: Never hide image links in messages, even if it's the only content

description: Shows your implicit relationships in the Friends tab.

name: Silly Kitten
description: Transform your messages into cute silly kitten text! >w<

name: NavidromeRPC
description: Show the currently playing song on your Navidrome server in your Rich Presence

name: NewUserIndicator
description: Adds a indicator if users account is created recently

name: NotifyUserChanges
description: Adds a notify option in the user context menu to get notified when a user changes voice channels or online status

name: AgeVerificationBypass
description: Bypass Discord's age verification checks, allowing you to access everything without verifying your age.

name: NSFWGateBypass
description: Forces 'Verified Adult' status, unlocks Stages, and clears all invite blocks.

name: OSSpoofer
description: Maximum possible OS spoofing at plugin level

commands.name: verify-os
commands.description: Verify the spoofed OS by triggering a reconnect and displaying the current spoofed OS.

name: PasswordManager
description: Securely store and manage your passwords

name: PasswordProtect
description: Passcode protect servers, channels, and dms. WARNING: Disabling the plugin will allow anyone to open the channels!

name: PhilsPluginLibrary
description: A library for phil's plugins

name: PunishmentCommands
description: Allows you to send a command in chat to punish someone, right from the context menu

name: PurgeMessages
description: Purges messages from a channel

commands.name: purge
commands.description: Purge a chosen amount of messages from a channel

name: QuickSnippet
description: append css snippets quickly to quickCss with one click!

name: pluginManager
description: Manage custom plugins

name: retardExterminator
description: Automatically bans users who spam rejoin voice channels

name: RelationshipIndicators
description: Adds icons to indicate relationships with users.

name: recentBan
description: Tools to ban recently joined VC users (only if owner)

name: RelationshipPruner
description: Adds a way to easily prune your servers and friends. To open, right click the home button or friends tab button

name: RepeatMessage
description: Allows you to repeat messages quickly. If you hold shift while clicking the Repeat option, it will reply to the message.

name: RobloxFilter
description: Protects your main account by filtering messages that violate Discord's ToS. Block, censor with asterisks, or SFW-replace offensive content. Named RobloxFilter because it sounds funny.

name: RoleDuplication
description: Be able to duplicate/clone roles

name: RunInConsole
description: Allows you to run code blocks in the console. Press Shift to edit the code before running.

name: SaveUserGifs
description: Right-click a user to save all GIFs they have sent to your favorites. Due to Discord's search API being non-deterministic, some GIFs may be missed on the first scan — simply run it again to pick up any remaining ones.

name: Server Pinner
description: Allows pinning servers via context menu. Dedicated category will be added in a future update.

name: ServerBackup
description: Backs up and restores complete Discord server configuration (roles, channels, permissions) - No permissions required

name: ServerProfilesToolbox
description: Adds a copy/paste/reset button to the server profiles editor

name: SettingsShortcuts
description: Adds Better Microphone and Better Screenshare shortcut buttons to Discord settings.

name: ShyTyping
description: Prevents you from accidentally revealing that you're lurking in a channel

name: SimplifiedProfileNotes
description: Show the notes text box in the new simplified profile popouts

name: ShareBanPerm
description: Allow VC owners to trigger voice ban commands with spam protection

name: Maxwell :3
description: Silly Silly Silly

name: VsCodeTyping
description: Forces a thick VS Code Block Cursor, Monospace font, and smooth cursor animation that follows the text.

name: SoundboardPro
description: Advanced soundboard with real sounds and synthetic sounds. Plays sounds directly in Discord voice channel.

name: Stalker v2
description: THIS STALKERS STALK BUTTON IS AT THE BOTTOM OF THE LIST WHEN U RCLICK A USER!!! | Advanced user tracking plugin that logs presence changes, profile updates, and activities. Track when users go online/offline, monitor profile changes, view activity history, and receive customizable notifications for each tracked user.

name: StatusCommand
description: Set a temporary status that reverts after a set duration (e.g. /status dnd 1h)

commands.name: status
commands.description: Set your status for a specific duration

name: Stalker
description: Notifies you whenever a target user changes status, joins VC, or sends a message. (fixed by x2b)

name: TeX
description: Typesets math in messages, written as `$x$` or `$$x$$`.

name: ToneIndicators
description: Adds descriptions when hovering over tone indicators.

name: TokenLoginManager
description: Manage and login with user tokens

name: Token Display
description: shows ur token with the command: /mytoken

commands.name: mytoken
commands.description: shows ur token (do not share with anyone)

name: UserNotes
description: Allows you to write unlimited notes for users, unlike Discord, which restricts saved notes to a maximum of 500 users and removes older notes when this limit is exceeded

name: TypingFriends
description: See which of your friends are typing anywhere

name: UserFlags
description: Add "flags" to users that will always show under their messages

commands.name: flag set
commands.description: Set a flag on a user

commands.name: flag delete
commands.description: Delete the flag from a user

name: UserpluginInstaller
description: Install userplugins with a simple button click

name: NewlinesInCommands
description: Allows shift+enter to create new lines in command inputs.

name: JunkCleanup
description: Another plugin that cleans up common annoyances in Discord

name: NotifyUserChanges
description: Adds a notify option in the user context menu to get notified when a user changes voice channels or online status

name: SilentTyping
description: Hide that you are typing

commands.name: silenttype
commands.description: Toggle whether you're hiding that you're typing or not.

name: VoiceChatUtilities
description: This plugin allows you to perform multiple actions on an entire channel (move, mute, disconnect, etc.) (originally by dutake)

name: ShowMessageEmbeds
description: Adds a context menu option to show embeds for links that don't have one

name: vcOwnerDetector
description: Tools to detect the owner of VC

name: vcGrape
description: R any loser in a vc with this trolling bot, originally created by atticus. Updated and fixed by dot

name: VCPanelSettings
description: Control voice settings right from the voice panel

name: ExitSounds
description: Play noises when you disconnect or swap channels.

name: AntiRickroll
description: Warns you of potential Rickrolls in messages, including masked links (supports custom rules)

name: Versions
description: Adds extra information to the version info

name: YTdownloader
description: Download music (320kbps) or video (1080p) from YouTube using yt-dlp and Deno. (plugin based on MediaDownloader)

commands.name: ytd
commands.description: Download video or audio from YouTube.

name: WordCount
description: Shows the word count of a message below it

name: ZipPreview
description: Preview and navigate inside zip files without extracting.
